title: Best practices for global invoices
excerpt: Learn the best practices for setting up invoices in non-US regions. The invoice compliance process can vary across countries. Stripe recommends the following best practices when you make sales to business customers because Business-to-Business (B2B) sales require compliant invoices. Business-to-Consumer (B2C) sales don’t generally require invoices. > The information on this page is for your general guidance. It isn’t legal advice. [Australia](https://docs.stripe.com/invoicing/australia-invoicing.md): Learn best practices for invoicing and meeting reporting requirements in Australia. [European Union](https://stripe.com/guides/invoicing-best-practices-for-the-european-union): Learn best practices for invoicing and meeting reporting requirements in the European Union.…
